programmes.show_description: Falling Stars: The team hones in on the island of Bermuda and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the area's dark reputation. (S2, ep 10)
The Alien Code: Giorgio A Tsoukalos investigates famous mysteries from every corner of the globe. Could they share links that connect them to the extraterrestrial? (S1, ep 10)
The Top Ten Alien Influencers: Did a biblical patriarch receive instructions from 200 angels, and was Egypt's most controversial Pharaoh an extraterrestrial being? (S16, ep 1)
Workmen in Canada film an enormous and enraged humanoid figure appearing to throw a tree trunk in the forests of Alberta. (S4, ep 2)
Karen in the Middle: Karen tries to make peace between Seth and Ashley, Bobby J takes a two-storey tractor for a spin and a watch snob riles Seth. (S12, ep 11)
Million Dollar Deal Part 1: A ventriloquist leaves Karen and Bobby J speechless, while an angry mixed martial arts fighter takes a swing at Byron. (S12, ep 12)
Million Dollar Deal Part 2: The Golds' million dollar art deal takes more twists and turns, but eventually, Les shakes hands on the single biggest purchase in store history. (S12, ep 13)
Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal or take a chance at auction instead? (S9, ep 47)
Wolverhampton 4: Has David Tupman got his work cut out when a Ruskin vase turns up? Will Karen Dalmeny be able to afford some beautiful Royal Worcester plates? (S10, ep 27)
The Pawnerator: Rick aims to get a rifle from the 1800s, a seller flexes a signed autobiography by Arnold Schwarzenegger and a ventriloquist doll makes Corey's head spin. (S24, ep 17)
Henry, Skid and Allen splash the fun fund on a forgotten Raleigh Grifter and race to revive it for one last big finish. Season finale. (S4, ep 10)
Hestered in the Highlands: The buyers head to the hills of Murietta for an auction that has tensions and prices running high. Dave drives Darrell to breaking point. (S7, ep 10)
Auction Boogaloo: Fierce competition greets Rene and Casey as they return to the auctions. Dave adds to the heat before unearthing a fantastic piece of board game history. (S7, ep 11)
Stormy Waters: With Sean as the captain, the biggest of the big-time bidders head to Marina Del Rey in search of true nautical treasures. (S2, ep 14)
Men at War: Our buyers throw down to win a locker packed with recreational equipment and what looks like a hidden tractor. (S2, ep 15)
When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction. (S4, ep 8)
Thousands of UFO sightings and abductions are reported every year. This series examines these accounts and casts new light on historic cases. (S1, ep 2)
Posting Up: As the team conducts an operation to mark the barrier of the massive Bubble anomaly, they make a series of shocking discoveries. (S6, ep 6)
Battle-Pawn: Rick prepares for battle over a pair of vintage posters, Corey takes a look at an old fireman's megaphone and Chum heads over to a photo gallery. (S24, ep 16)
Locktoberfest: Darrell and Brandon have high hopes as they return to the site of their biggest score. The others bid to take down the self-proclaimed "King of Montebello". (S7, ep 12)
My Little Brony: The action shifts to Oceanside, where Rene plans to make the others pay for crashing his home turf. Darrell and Brandon fight for a piece of film history. (S7, ep 13)

programmes.show_description: Strange Places: Join Dan Aykroyd as he takes a look at unexplained phenomena in the Lake Michigan Triangle and explores the most haunted place in America. (S1, ep 1)

programmes.show_name: New: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programmes.show_description: Bizarre Deaths: From a 25-foot tidal wave of molasses engulfing Boston to a dancing plague claiming the lives of 100 people, Dan explores some of the strangest deaths on record. (S1, ep 2)
Worm in the Sky, Skeletal Mystery Remains and Thessaloniki Mystery Sounds: What causes the thunderous banging noises that wake Thessaloniki residents every night? (S4, ep 10)
